title: Enhanced JBrowse plugins for epigenomics data visualization.
author: Hofmeister BT Schmitz RJ
content:
S-EPMC5921565 PMC5921565 Enhanced JBrowse plugins for epigenomics data visualization.

Background

New sequencing techniques require new visualization strategies, as is the case for epigenomics data such as DNA base modifications, small non-coding RNAs, and histone modifications.
